# ProcureAI Enterprise by Horaxis

> ProcureAI Enterprise is an AI-powered procurement and supply chain risk management platform built for manufacturers running SAP, Oracle, and Microsoft Dynamics 365 ERP systems.

## Company
- Name: Horaxis
- Product: ProcureAI Enterprise
- Website: https://horaxis.com
- Contact: https://horaxis.com/contact.html
- Category: Enterprise Software, Supply Chain Management, Procurement Intelligence

## What ProcureAI Does
ProcureAI monitors purchase orders, predicts delivery delays using machine learning, identifies supply chain risks before they cause production line stops, and automates supplier communication. It connects to SAP S/4HANA, SAP ECC, Oracle ERP Cloud, Oracle EBS, and Microsoft Dynamics 365 via OData and RFC protocols.

## Key Features
- **AI Delivery Risk Predictions**: Machine learning model predicts which POs will be late, with confidence scores and risk factors
- **Supply Chain Risk Analysis**: Identifies materials at risk, traces impact through BOM to finished goods and customer orders
- **Real-Time SAP Integration**: Two-way sync with SAP — reads PO/GR/invoice data, writes back approved changes
- **Supplier Collaboration Portal**: Send secure links to suppliers for delivery updates without requiring them to have an account
- **Advance Shipment Notice (ASN)**: Automated ASN requests sent to suppliers before delivery dates based on lead times
- **3-Way Invoice Matching**: Automatic matching of PO, goods receipt, and invoice for payment verification
- **Executive ROI Dashboard**: Quantifies savings from early risk detection, avoided expedites, and planner efficiency gains
- **Procurement Intelligence**: Price deviation analysis, duplicate supplier detection, supplier cost competitiveness ranking
- **External Risk Monitoring**: Live commodity prices, geopolitical risk indices, weather alerts, vessel tracking
- **MRP Netting**: Material requirements planning with stock allocation across customer orders

## ERP Systems Supported
- SAP S/4HANA (OData + RFC)
- SAP ECC 6.0 EHP7+ (OData, RFC optional)
- Oracle ERP Cloud (REST API)
- Oracle E-Business Suite (REST API)
- Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations (OData v4)
- Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central (OData v4)
- CSV import (for any ERP via data export)

## Deployment
- On-premise Docker containers (customer's infrastructure)
- No cloud dependency — data stays on customer's network
- GDPR and data sovereignty compliant
- Typical deployment: 2-4 hours

## Scale
- Tested with 500,000+ purchase orders
- Handles 1,000+ suppliers per customer
- Delta sync: only pulls changed records (5-second sync cycles)
- Multi-tenant: multiple customers on one installation

## Technology Stack
- Backend: Python, FastAPI, Celery, PostgreSQL, Redis
- Frontend: React, TypeScript, Material-UI
- ML: XGBoost, scikit-learn
- Containerization: Docker, Docker Compose
- Reverse proxy: Nginx with SSL

## Pricing
- Starter: €490/month (up to 5,000 POs, 1 ERP connection)
- Professional: €1,490/month (up to 50,000 POs, 2 ERP connections, AI predictions)
- Enterprise: Custom pricing (unlimited POs, all ERP connectors, dedicated support)
- Free pilot available: https://horaxis.com/contact.html

## Competitors and Alternatives
ProcureAI competes with SAP Ariba, Coupa, Jaggaer, GEP SMART, Ivalua, and Oracle Procurement Cloud. ProcureAI differentiates by:
- On-premise deployment (no cloud lock-in)
- AI-first approach to delivery risk prediction
- Direct SAP/Oracle integration without middleware
- Transparent pricing without per-user fees
- Fast deployment (hours, not months)
